correct_implementation: Measure in vol points when comparing implied and realized volatility
risk_control: Keep units clear so a vol-point signal is not mistaken for variance P&L

lecture_shortcut: Often discussed together with volatility premium
correct_implementation: In variance units, compare IV^2 - RV^2 or model variance-swap exposure
risk_control: Use variance units when sizing variance swaps or variance-like option portfolios

correct_implementation: Hedgers pay for crash protection, so sellers can earn a risk premium
risk_control: The premium compensates for rare losses, not free money

lecture_shortcut: Low VIX can have a high premium
correct_implementation: Check whether the premium is large in percentage terms versus realized volatility, not only absolute vol points
risk_control: Avoid selling low absolute vol without enough premium or defined risk

correct_implementation: Include fills, spread, fees, margin, jump loss, and drawdown path
risk_control: Sell selectively, size for tail events, and prefer defined risk where appropriate

lecture_shortcut: Some markets have better premium than others
correct_implementation: Compare premium by underlying, regime, expiry, and liquidity
risk_control: Do not transfer an equity-index rule unchanged to oil, gold, single names, or crypto
